content:
Got it — reverting. Removing the C variant files and the latest image, restoring the index to A/B only.Now restore index.html to A/B only. Let me check current state.Done — removed `feed-1x1-c.html`, deleted the latest uploaded image (`mppnwvzx-inku-image-...png`), and reverted the Feed 1:1 row in `index.html` back to just A / B.

Campaign is back to the 8-ad state (4 placements × A/B) using the earlier designs and assets. What would you like to do next — try the motion graphic idea on one of the existing A or B variants, or something else?
